main.269: ソリューション / 品質検査
main.270: GYUTRONはスマートカメラ、白色ビジョン照明、産業用センサー、バーコード検証、エッジ制御、品質データのワークフローを統合し、工場が不良をより早く発見し後工程を守る検査システムを実現します。
main.272: 生産ライン全体のインライン検査、組立確認、トレーサビリティ、再現性のある品質エビデンスに対応します。
main.278: 外観確認から追跡可能な品質判断まで対応します。
main.279: 先進的な産業検査エコシステムに着想を得た本ソリューションは、GYUTRONを単なるハードウェア供給者ではなく、カメラ、センシング、コード読み取り、照明、コントローラ、品質記録を一つの運用システムとして設計する存在と位置づけます。
main.280: 部品欠品、向き違い、組立不良、表面異常、高さばらつき、外観欠陥を生産速度で検出します。
main.281: バーコードとDPMコードを読み取り、ラベルを検証し、スキャン記録をロットに紐づけ、検査エビデンスを個体ごとに保持します。
main.282: 校正済み画像取得、レーザー測定、検査機器により、再現性のある公差確認と外観評価を行います。
main.283: ロボット動作、固定ビジョン、ガイド付き検査ポイントを組み合わせ、最終組立、包装、多面的な製品確認に対応します。
main.285: 工場の意思決定につながる検査ハードウェア。
main.286: 本アーキテクチャは画像取得、センサートリガー、照明制御、エッジ解析、PLCハンドシェイク、品質データ収集を連携させ、検査結果が後工程に流れる前に不良を止められるようにします。
main.287: GYUTRONスマートカメラと検査セルのイメージ
main.289: スマートカメラ、コードリーダー、センサー、安定した白色照明が検査ポイントで信頼性の高いデータを取得します。
main.291: エッジコントローラとビジョンツールが有無、位置、寸法、コード品質、表面状態を評価します。
main.293: PLC信号、I/Oモジュール、ロボットやコンベアのロジックが、検査結果に基づき製品の排除、停止、振り分け、流動を制御します。
main.295: 画像、結果、デバイスイベント、スキャンIDをMES、WMS、ダッシュボード、顧客向け品質レポート用に構造化できます。

main.300: 不良の種類、ライン速度、サンプル部品、排除ロジック、トレーサビリティ記録、合否判定の責任を明確にします。
main.301: 実機ステーションに合わせてカメラ、照明、センサー、スキャナー、エッジコントローラ、取付具、インターフェースを選定します。

sol.common.products.title: Products used in this solution
sol.common.products.intro: Every GYUTRON solution is built from our own hardware. Combine these product lines into one integrated, single-vendor system — sensing, identification, measurement, guidance and actuation from a single partner.
sol.avi.gallery.title: What the inspection cell actually sees
sol.avi.gallery.intro: Representative frames from a deployed cell — the defect classes the system catches and the annotated pass/fail result the line returns. Sample frames shown; real production captures are dropped in per line.
sol.avi.shot.1.cap: Raw capture — SMT board entering the station
sol.avi.shot.2.cap: Solder bridge / short detected and boxed
sol.avi.shot.3.cap: Missing component flagged against the golden board
sol.avi.shot.4.cap: Annotated result — pass/fail with measured offsets
sol.avi.case.title: Inline AOI on an SMT assembly line
sol.avi.case.challenge.v: End-of-line visual checks missed solder and placement defects and depended on operator judgment, letting escapes reach rework.
sol.avi.case.approach.v: Two area-scan stations with controlled lighting inspect every board inline; an integrated code reader ties each defect map to the board 2D code for full traceability.
sol.avi.case.result.v: Every board inspected inline with a consistent, searchable image record per serial number, and far fewer defects escaping to downstream rework.
sol.avi.cases.title: Where GYUTRON vision inspection runs
sol.avi.cases.intro: Inspection scenarios the hardware is built for. Named customer references and on-site photos are added as approvals clear.
sol.avi.case1.title: Inline AOI for solder, placement and code defects on assembly lines
sol.avi.case1.metric: Every board inspected · image record per serial
sol.avi.case2.title: Connector, weld-seam and cell-stack inspection with full traceability
sol.avi.case2.metric: Defect map tied to each part code
sol.avi.case3.title: 100% appearance and assembly verification with a per-unit image archive

sol.measurement-3d-profiling.name: Measurement & 3D Profiling
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.seoTitle: Measurement & 3D Profiling Solutions | Inline Dimensional Gauging & Metrology | GYUTRON
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.seoDesc: Inline dimensional gauging, laser 3D profiling, and traceable metrology from GYUTRON. Sub-micron repeatability, 100% gauging at line speed, gauge-block-traceable results with full SPC logging.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.hero.title: Stop shipping out-of-tolerance parts
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.hero.desc: Hand calipers and sampling miss drift, deform soft parts, and leave no audit trail. GYUTRON gauges every part inline with telecentric optics and laser 3D profiling — height, gap, flatness, and form measured to sub-micron repeatability, traceable to gauge blocks, logged for SPC.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.hero.panelD: 2σ on telecentric optical gauges; laser profile Z-repeatability to 0.5 µm. Traceable to certified gauge blocks; results time-stamped per part for SPC and audit.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.gallery.int: Real captured profiles and gauging overlays from GYUTRON optical and laser measurement systems.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.shot.2.cap: 3D height map of connector lead row
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.shot.3.cap: Sealing-face deviation color map vs datum
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.shot.4.cap: Gap and step measured on stamped panel
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.shot.5.cap: Weld bead volume from snapshot profiler
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.shot.6.cap: Diameter run chart drifting toward limit
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.title: What the measurement layer does
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.intro: Non-contact gauging that replaces manual sampling — dimensional, height, and form data captured on every part, referenced to traceable standards.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.1.title: Telecentric Dimensional Gauging
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.1.desc: Edge, diameter, gap, and concentricity to ±0.8 µm 2σ. Distortion-free telecentric optics; no contact, no part deformation.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.2.title: Laser 3D Profiling
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.2.desc: Single-line and snapshot profilers reconstruct height, step, flatness, and warpage. Z-repeatability to 0.5 µm at full scan speed.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.3.title: Surface Form & Height
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.3.desc: Coplanarity, ball/lead height, weld bead, glue-line volume. Dense point clouds resolve features 2D imaging cannot reach.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.4.title: Traceable & SPC-Ready
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cap.4.desc: Gauge-block-referenced calibration with R&R support. Every result time-stamped to the part ID and streamed to SPC.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.arch.title: Sense → Profile → Gauge → Record
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.arch.intro: A measurement cell built from GYUTRON optics, lasers, and edge compute — calibrated to traceable standards and wired into your quality system end to end.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.arch.1.desc: Encoder or sensor triggers capture as the part enters frame. Telecentric optics and white-light or laser illumination freeze the feature without motion blur.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.arch.2.desc: Laser profiler sweeps the surface; edge controller fuses scans into a calibrated 3D point cloud and aligns it to the part datum.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.arch.3.desc: Dimensions extracted against the CAD-derived tolerance set. Pass / fail / rework decided in under 60 ms and signaled to the line PLC.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.arch.4.desc: Each measurement, overlay image, and verdict is logged to the part ID and pushed to SPC / MES for trend control and audit recall.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.title: From sample part to qualified gauge
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.intro: GYUTRON application engineers prove capability on your parts before rollout — gauge R&R signed off, not assumed.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.1.title: Feature & tolerance review
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.1.desc: We map critical dimensions, datums, and tolerance bands from the drawing, then select optics, laser, and field of view to suit.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.2.title: Capability study
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.2.desc: Run gauge R&R on your sample parts against certified standards. Confirm repeatability, bias, and cycle time before any line work.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.3.title: Integrate & qualify
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.wf.3.desc: Mount, calibrate, wire to PLC and SPC. Sign off measurement system analysis, then hand over with operator and recalibration procedures.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cases.title: Where inline measurement pays off
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cases.intro: Two representative deployments where sampling left defects in the field and 100% inline gauging closed the gap.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.case1.title: CNC turned parts gauged 100% inline
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.case1.metri: Diameter, length, and groove width measured to ±0.8 µm on every shaft; out-of-tolerance parts diverted before downstream assembly, replacing 1-in-50 hand-caliper sampling.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.case2.title: Connector coplanarity by laser profiling
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.case2.metri: Lead and ball height mapped across the full footprint; coplanarity over spec flagged at ~30 ms/part, catching bent leads that 2D vision missed.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cs.title: Sealing-face flatness gauged inline on a machined casting line
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cs.challeng: A powertrain machining line released castings on a 1-in-30 sample using hand depth gauges. Sealing-face flatness drift between samples reached the customer as leak failures, and contact gauging marked soft aluminum faces.
sol.measurement-3d-profiling.cs.approach: A GYUTRON laser profiler scanned each sealing face inline, reconstructing a 3D surface and computing flatness against the datum plane in under 50 ms. Telecentric gauges added bore diameter and bolt-hole spacing in the same cell. All results were referenced to certified gauge blocks and streamed to SPC keyed to the casting serial.

sol.vision-guided-robotics.cs.title: Random bin picking of shiny machined parts for CNC loading
sol.vision-guided-robotics.cs.challenge: A precision machining shop fed CNC lathes by hand from bins of chrome-plated steel shafts dumped in random orientations. The reflective, partially overlapping parts defeated an earlier 2D-only system, and hard tooling could not handle 40+ part variants with frequent changeovers. Manual loading capped uptime and exposed operators to sharp, oily stock.
sol.vision-guided-robotics.cs.approach: A GYUTRON cell paired a blue-light structured-light 3D head with an area-scan camera and a robot-mounted edge controller. HDR multi-exposure capture recovered clean point clouds off the chrome surfaces; CAD matching computed 6-DoF poses, and grasp planning checked bin walls, neighbor parts, and gripper clearance before each pick. Coordinates streamed to the existing robot in its base frame, with automatic re-imaging on any missed grasp.
sol.vision-guided-robotics.cs.result: Sustained > 99.5% first-attempt pick success across the bin, including the last layer, at a 0.38 s locate-and-plan cycle and < 0.1 mm pose accuracy. Changeover to a new part variant dropped from hours of re-fixturing to a CAD import. The cell ran lights-out across two shifts, freeing operators from manual loading and lifting CNC utilization.

sol.composite-mobile-robots.cs.title: Mobile manipulators feeding 3C and semiconductor lines
sol.composite-mobile-robots.cs.challenge: Reels, trays, and carriers move between SMT feeders, test handlers, and stockers by manual cart. Operators walk parts station to station, mis-loads stop the line, and there is no per-carrier record of who touched what or when.
sol.composite-mobile-robots.cs.approach: A mobile manipulator -- AMR base, cobot arm, 3D area-scan head, and on-arm code reader -- drives to each station and docks at +/-100 m. The 3D head locates the carrier and corrects for docking offset; the arm picks to +/-0.05 mm. The on-arm reader confirms the DPM or 2D code before release, and the edge controller reports pose, identity, and AMR position to MES every cycle.
sol.composite-mobile-robots.cs.result: Hands-free transfer between tools, <8 s per pick-and-place, 99.5% first-pass code read, and zero wrong-slot loads released. Full chain-of-custody per carrier; one fleet tends multiple lines instead of operators walking parts.

ind.section.label: Industries We Serve
ind.elec.name: Electronics & Semiconductor Manufacturing
ind.elec.intro: Machine vision and inspection across the electronics chain — 3C consumer electronics, PCB/PCBA, SMT and EMS lines, and semiconductor packaging.
ind.elec.detail: GYUTRON vision, code reading, and 3D measurement run the full electronics line — solder-paste, placement, and reflow inspection (SPI, AOI, AXI), plus module, housing, and final-assembly checks. High-resolution imaging and DPM / 2D code reading give board- and unit-level traceability from incoming components to end of line.
ind.battery.name: EV Battery & New Energy
ind.battery.tagline: Cell, module, and pack inspection for new energy.
ind.battery.intro: Vision and 3D inspection for new-energy battery manufacturing — cell, module, pack, electrode, welding, and assembly.
ind.battery.detail: From cell to pack, 3D laser profiling and vision inspect gap & flush, weld seams, and sealant beads, while code readers bind every cell, busbar, and module into MES traceability. Built for highly reflective metal, fast takt time, and the geometry-critical checks new-energy lines demand.
ind.logi.name: Logistics & Warehouse Automation
ind.logi.intro: Robotics and identification for intralogistics — AGV/AMR fleets, smart warehousing, sortation, and in-plant material flow.
ind.logi.detail: AGV/AMR fleets, fixed and handheld code readers, and vision keep intralogistics moving — autonomous transport, smart warehousing, sortation, and palletizing. Rugged data capture keeps receiving, picking, and shipping accurate, with full visibility across in-plant material flow.
ind.gen.name: General Manufacturing & Industrial Automation
ind.gen.tagline: Machining, packaging, and non-standard line automation.
ind.gen.intro: Inspection and automation for general manufacturing — machining, metal and plastic parts, packaging, food & beverage, and non-standard line upgrades.
ind.gen.detail: Across machining, metal, plastics, packaging, and food & beverage, GYUTRON vision, sensors, and measurement handle surface and dimensional inspection, presence/absence, and code verification. Modular cameras, lighting, and controllers drop into new lines or upgrade existing ones — including non-standard automation.
